primary_link.title: Subliminal Steering: Stronger Encoding of Hidden Signals

papers.summary: Subliminal learning describes a student language model inheriting a behavioral bias by fine-tuning on seemingly innocuous data generated by a biased teacher model. Prior work has begun to characterize this phenomenon but leaves open questions about the scope of signals it can transfer, the mechanisms that explain it, and the precision with which a bias can be encoded by seemingly unrelated data. papers.summary_zh: Subliminal learning 描述了學生語言模型透過對由有偏見的 teacher model 生成的看似無害的數據進行 fine-tuning，從而繼承行為偏見。先前的研究已開始描述這種現象，但在其可傳輸信號的範圍、解釋其機制的原理以及看似無關的數據可以編碼偏見的精確度方面留下了懸而未決的問題。我們透過引入 subliminal steering（一種 subliminal learning 的變體）來解決所有這三個問題。

radar.summary: Generative linguistic steganography (GLS) enables covert communication by embedding secret messages into the natural language generation process. In practical deployment, however, GLS is vulnerable to tokenization ambiguity: the same surface text may be re-tokenized into a different token sequence at the receiver, breaking the shared decoding state between the communicating parties so that a single local mismatch can propagate into complete extraction failure. primary_link.title: Safe-Support Q-Learning: Learning without Unsafe Exploration

radar.summary: Ensuring safety during reinforcement learning (RL) training is critical in real-world applications where unsafe exploration can lead to devastating outcomes. While most safe RL methods mitigate risk through constraints or penalization, they still allow exploration of unsafe states during training. primary_link.title: R$^3$-SQL: Ranking Reward and Resampling for Text-to-SQL

radar.summary: Modern Text-to-SQL systems generate multiple candidate SQL queries and rank them to judge a final prediction. However, existing methods face two limitations. First, they often score functionally equivalent SQL queries inconsistently despite identical execution results. Second, ranking cannot recover when the correct SQL is absent from the candidate pool. radar.summary_zh: 現代 Text-to-SQL 系統生成多個候選 SQL 查詢並對其進行排序，以判斷最終預測。然而，現有方法面臨兩個限制。首先，儘管執行結果相同，它們卻經常對功能等效的 SQL 查詢給出不一致的分數。其次，當正確的 SQL 不在候選池中時，排序無法恢復。我們提出了 R$^3$-SQL，這是一個 Text-to-SQL 框架，透過統一的排序獎勵和重採樣來解決這兩個問題。R$^3$-SQL 首先 gro

links.title: A paradox of AI fluency

primary_link.title: A paradox of AI fluency

radar.summary: How much does a user's skill with AI shape what AI actually delivers for them? This question is critical for users, AI product builders, and society at large, but it remains underexplored. Using a richly annotated sample of 27K transcripts from WildChat-4.8M, we show that fluent users take on more complex tasks than novices and adopt a fundamentally different interactional mode: they iterate collaboratively with the AI, refining goals and critically assessing outputs, whereas novices take a pass
radar.summary_zh: 使用者對 AI 的熟練程度如何影響 AI 實際為他們提供的成果？這個問題對於使用者、AI 產品開發者以及整個社會都至關重要，但仍未被充分探索。我們利用 WildChat-4.8M 中 27K 筆經過豐富註釋的對話紀錄樣本，表明熟練使用者比新手承擔更複雜的任務，並採取根本上不同的互動模式：他們與 AI 協同迭代，完善目標並批判性地評估輸出，而新手則較少進行迭代和批判性評估。
radar.title: A paradox of AI fluency
radar.title_zh: AI 流暢度的一個悖論

radar.summary: In the MNIST auxiliary logit distillation experiment, a student can acquire an unintended teacher trait despite distilling only on no-class logits through a phenomenon called subliminal learning. radar.summary: Online comments play a crucial role in shaping public sentiment and opinion dynamics on social media. However, evaluating their popularity remains challenging, not only because it depends on linguistic quality, originality, and emotional resonance, but also because stylistic preferences vary widely across platforms and user groups, causing the same comment to resonate differently in different communities. radar.summary_zh: 線上評論在塑造社群媒體上的公眾情緒和輿論動態方面扮演著關鍵角色。然而，評估其熱度仍然具有挑戰性，不僅因為它取決於語言品質、原創性和情感共鳴，而且因為風格偏好在不同平台和使用者群體之間差異很大，導致相同的評論在不同社群中產生不同的共鳴。在這項工作中，我們提出了 HotComment，這是一個整合了影片和文字模式的多模態基準

radar.summary: Artificial intelligence systems are increasingly integrated into writing processes, challenging traditional notions of authorship, responsibility, and intellectual contribution. Current disclosure practices usually indicate whether AI was used, but rarely explain how it was used, where it intervened, or how its output was reviewed. radar.summary: The release of GPT-image-2 by OpenAI marks a watershed moment in AI-generated imagery: the boundary between photographic reality and synthetic content has never been more difficult to discern. Leveraging the Twitter API v2 and a multi-stage curation pipeline spanning multilingua

radar.summary: Fair re-ranking aims to promote long-tail items and enhance diversity within groups in information retrieval. While previous research on online fairness-aware re-ranking has shown promising outcomes, our comprehensive evaluation of online fair re-ranking methods over 20 settings reveals significant performance disparities among existing methods. radar.summary_zh: 公平重新排序旨在促進資訊檢索中的長尾項目並增強組內的多元性。儘管先前關於線上公平感知重新排序的研究已顯示出有希望的結果，但我們對超過 20 種設定下的線上公平重新排序方法進行的綜合評估揭示了現有方法之間存在顯著的性能差異。為了揭示這些不一致的根本原因，我們在由 Walrasian Equilibrium 所支配的注意力市場框架內重新形式化了公平重新排序。

radar.summary_zh: SignSGD 將每個 stochastic gradient 座標壓縮到一個位元，提供了大量的記憶體和通訊節省，但其 1-bit quantization 消除了量值資訊，並且已知相對於優化良好的 SGD 會留下 generalization gap。我們從 1-bit quantization 和 dithering 的角度重新審視 SignSGD，並提出了三項改進。首先，我們在單峰對稱梯度雜訊下，使用 signal-to-noise weighted statistic 導出了 SignSGD 的小批量收斂率。

primary_link.title: Migrating a text agent to a voice assistant with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic

radar.summary: In this post, we explore what it takes to migrate a traditional text agent into a conversational voice assistant using Amazon Nova 2 Sonic. This post helps you navigate the migration process and avoid common pitfalls.

primary_link.title: NVLLM: A 3D NAND-Centric Architecture Enabling Edge on-Device LLM Inference

top5.summary: The rapid growth of LLMs demands high-throughput, memory-capacity-intensive inference on resource-constrained edge devices, where single-batch decoding remains fundamentally memory-bound. Existing out-of-core GPU-based and SSD-like accelerators are limited by DRAM-bound weight movement and inefficient storage access granularity. We present NVLLM, a 3D NAND-centric inference architecture that offloads feed-forward network (FFN) computation into the Flash while executing attention on lightweight C
top5.summary_zh: LLMs 的快速增長要求在資源受限的 edge devices 上進行高吞吐量、記憶體密集型的推理，其中 single-batch decoding 仍然受限於記憶體瓶頸。現有的 out-of-core GPU-based 和 SSD-like 加速器受限於 DRAM-bound 權重移動和低效的儲存訪問粒度。我們提出 NVLLM，這是一種以 3D NAND 為中心的推理架構，它將 feed-forward network (FFN) 計算卸載到 Flash 中，同時在輕量級 C 上執行 attention。
